_comment: Hand-maintained by whoever launches a porting batch — never edited by a porting agent itself. See docs/parallel-porting.md. Components not listed here are simply not started; see wcag-data/ for the full CivicTheme component list.

accordion.note: Merged to main via PR #4. First component using @zag-js for state. Introduced the shared src/lib/zag adapter, the ct-accordion + ct-accordion-item parent/child pattern, and the shared color.light/color.dark/typography token tier — treat as the reference example for future stateful/composite components, not just a status entry.

grid.note: Predates the scaffold-based process (no schema/test/e2e/config). Not in scope for the parallel port list until retrofitted.

region.note: Predates the scaffold-based process (no schema/test/e2e). Not in scope for the parallel port list until retrofitted.

tag.note: First parallel-porting dry run, validating docs/parallel-porting.md before merging parallel-porting-infra. Merged cleanly; also surfaced and fixed the worktree/Fractal dot-path bug (see lab.cjs).

link.note: First parallel-porting dry run, validating docs/parallel-porting.md before merging parallel-porting-infra. Sequential merge after tag produced exactly one trivial tokens.json conflict (both added an adjacent top-level key), as expected.

icon.note: Not a CivicTheme component in its own right — a shared ct-icon primitive inlining CivicTheme's SVG icon set, wired into button/link/tag's previously-dangling icon prop. Merged via PR #6/#7. Established the pattern (and the SKILL.md/checklist steps) for checking whether a new/changed component is composed inside another component's shadow DOM and regenerating that consumer's Linux visual-regression baseline via CI's workflow_dispatch, not locally.

heading.note: Merged to main via PR #12. A second bulk-batch worktree (CT_FRACTAL_PORT 3010) independently ported the same component after forking before this merge landed; since it was fully redundant, that worktree and its branch were removed rather than reconciled.

label.note: 2026-07-20 bulk batch (5 components), 01-atoms. Merged to main via PR #10.

content-link.note: 2026-07-20 bulk batch (5 components), 01-atoms. Merged to main via PR #9.

field-message.note: 2026-07-20 bulk batch (5 components), 01-atoms. Uses ct-icon for its status glyph (error/information/warning/success) — first real consumer of ct-icon added since it landed. Merged to main via PR #11.

chip.note: 2026-07-20 bulk batch (5 components), 01-atoms. Merged to main via PR #13.

image.note: 2026-07-20 bulk batch 2 (5 components), 01-atoms. Merged to main via PR #17.

logo.note: 2026-07-20 bulk batch 2 (5 components), 02-molecules. Merged to main via PR #18. logo.twig composes civictheme:image; image wasn't merged yet in this branch's sibling worktree at port time, so logo fell back to a plain — flagged as a follow-up to revisit now that image is merged.

breadcrumb.note: 2026-07-20 bulk batch 2 (5 components), 02-molecules. Merged to main via PR #19.

basic-content.note: 2026-07-20 bulk batch 2 (5 components), 02-molecules. Merged to main via PR #21.

attachment.note: 2026-07-20 bulk batch 2 (5 components), 02-molecules. Merged to main via PR #20.

table.note: 2026-07-20 bulk batch 3 (5 components), 01-atoms. Merged to main via PR #23.

video.note: 2026-07-20 bulk batch 3 (5 components), 01-atoms. Merged to main via PR #24.

paragraph.note: 2026-07-20 bulk batch 3 (5 components), 01-atoms. Merged to main via PR #25. No upstream civictheme:* includes of its own; unblocks callout/next-step/fieldset for a future batch.

item-list.note: 2026-07-20 bulk batch 3 (5 components), 00-base. Merged to main via PR #26. No upstream civictheme:* includes of its own; unblocks callout/social-links for a future batch.

tooltip.note: 2026-07-20 bulk batch 3 (5 components), 02-molecules. Merged to main via PR #27. Composes civictheme:button and civictheme:icon, both already merged.

alert.note: 2026-07-21 bulk batch 4 (5 components), 03-organisms. Merged to main via PR #28. Composes civictheme:button and civictheme:icon, both already merged.

banner.note: 2026-07-21 bulk batch 4 (5 components), 03-organisms. Merged to main via PR #29. Composes civictheme:breadcrumb, civictheme:heading, civictheme:image, all already merged.

callout.note: 2026-07-21 bulk batch 4 (5 components), 02-molecules. Merged to main via PR #30. Composes civictheme:button, civictheme:heading, civictheme:item-list, civictheme:paragraph, all already merged.

next-steps.note: 2026-07-21 bulk batch 4 (5 components), 02-molecules. Merged to main via PR #31. Upstream folder is singular `next-step`. Composes civictheme:heading, civictheme:link, civictheme:paragraph, all already merged.

social-links.note: 2026-07-21 bulk batch 4 (5 components), 02-molecules. Merged to main via PR #32. Composes civictheme:button and civictheme:item-list, both already merged.

navigation-card.note: 2026-07-22 bulk batch 5 (5 components), 02-molecules. Composes civictheme:icon, civictheme:image, civictheme:paragraph, all already merged. Merged to main via PR #34. Porting agent hit an account limit before committing; a review pass found and fixed a real bug (image-as-icon thumbnail hardcoded to 1em instead of the --ct-icon-size-extra-large token) before landing.

publication-card.note: 2026-07-22 bulk batch 5 (5 components), 02-molecules. Composes civictheme:icon, civictheme:image, civictheme:link, civictheme:paragraph, all already merged. Merged to main via PR #34.

service-card.note: 2026-07-22 bulk batch 5 (5 components), 02-molecules. Composes civictheme:heading, civictheme:item-list, civictheme:link, all already merged. Merged to main via PR #34.

subject-card.note: 2026-07-22 bulk batch 5 (5 components), 02-molecules. Composes civictheme:image, already merged. Merged to main via PR #34. Porting agent hit an account limit before committing; work was reviewed and committed as-is after verification (no defects found).

search.note: 2026-07-22 bulk batch 5 (5 components), 02-molecules. Composes civictheme:link, already merged.

textfield.note: 2026-07-22 bulk batch 6, wave 1a (01-atoms). No civictheme:* deps.

textarea.note: 2026-07-22 bulk batch 6, wave 1a (01-atoms). No civictheme:* deps.

select.note: 2026-07-22 bulk batch 6, wave 1a (01-atoms). No civictheme:* deps.

input.note: 2026-07-22 bulk batch 6, wave 1a (01-atoms). No civictheme:* deps. Needed because civictheme:field composes it — added to unblock the field molecule in wave 2.

field-description.note: 2026-07-22 bulk batch 6, wave 1a (01-atoms). No civictheme:* deps.
